creator: yklaxds@gmail.com
text:
As long as any directory or folder in the current version (historical versions cannot be modified, so they can never be pulled) of the git project does not meet the standards, git cannot be used to pull it on Windows. Therefore, merely modifying subsequent versions is meaningless.  

As for whether the website can implement some 301 redirects or similar operations? Or automatically handle this in git Action or documentation-related programs?
